description_long: This object is a streamlined airplane with a rounded nose and a smooth, metallic fuselage painted primarily white with a red upper section and accents. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, extending symmetrically from the fuselage, and the tail features a single vertical stabilizer with red and blue markings. The cockpit is located at the front, with a series of black windows running along the side, indicating a passenger configuration. The engines are integrated into the lower front section of the fuselage, with two visible intakes beneath the nose. The airplane has a conventional tail design and lacks visible landing gear in the current views. The surface appears glossy and hard, reflecting light smoothly across its body.
description: A white and red passenger airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, a rounded nose, and a single vertical stabilizer with colored markings. The cockpit is forward with multiple side windows and integrated front engines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, cockpit windows, and two engine intakes beneath the fuselage.
description_view_1: Left-side perspective highlighting the mid-mounted wing, row of passenger windows, and colored tail fin.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, streamlined fuselage, and tail configuration.
description_view_3: Right-side perspective similar to view 1, showing the opposite side's windows and tail markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated beneath the forward fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear in the current views.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
